title: pckg interactive first-run onboarding

source.subject: feat: interactive first-run onboarding and migration service

body:
Ships **interactive first-run onboarding** and migration service for empty pckg deployments.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`1402410`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/1402410)
- **Subject:** feat: interactive first-run onboarding and migration service
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`

## Relation
Operator UX for fresh registry installs (Coolify and local).
